narrative_beat: Wide helice DNA em cores douradas flutuando sobre fundo P&B de hospital

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive golden DNA double helix floating and rotating in the center of the frame, emitting warm amber light, surrounded by floating generic ampules with unreadable labels
subject.focal_point: the center of the DNA helix where the strands intertwine
subject.secondary: Hospital corridors in monochrome behind the floating helix.

environment.location: a hospital atrium with high ceilings
environment.time_of_day: clinical lighting with golden DNA glow
environment.atmosphere: biotechnology as new religion, genetic power

composition.foreground: golden DNA helix in vivid warm amber and gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white hospital corridors and ceiling

lighting.key_light: golden light emanating from DNA helix itself

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: biotechnological hegemony, genetic manipulation as power

symbolism.primary: mRNA as the rewriting of human code — malaria, cancer, everything
symbolism.secondary: DNA helix as golden idol of the new age

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
